case_title: MICHAEL BOWEN VS. TRACY BRIDGETTE MCNEAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL BOWEN AND DEFENDANT TRACY BRIDGETTE MCNEAL. MICHELLE SAYADA & ANTHONY FLORES, WITNESSES FOR DEFENDANT, WERE PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BOWEN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MCNEAL, TRACY BRIDGETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOWEN, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCNEAL, TRACY BRIDGETTE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 85.00 - SERVED JUN-11-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCNEAL, TRACY BRIDGETTE
